snippet.title: Alex Warren - Ordinary (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
👉Alex Warren - Ordinary (Lyrics)

🎵 Follow the official Golden Network playlist on Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/playlist/78TFbUcZBZ8a70kFHK1et9?si=cb29aee6e1ec4cc0

🔔 Hit the Subscribe Button and Turn on notifications to stay updated with new uploads!

🎤 Song Lyrics : Alex Warren - Ordinary (Lyrics)

Lyrics : 

[Verse 1]
They say, "The holy water's watered down
And this town's lost its faith
Our colors will fade eventually"
So, if our time is runnin' out
Day after day
We'll make the mundane our masterpiece

[Pre-Chorus]
Oh, my, my
Oh, my, my love
I take one look at you

[Chorus]
You're takin' me out of the ordinary
I want you layin' me down 'til we're dead and buried
On the edge of your knife, stayin' drunk on your vine
The angels up in the clouds are jealous knowin' we found
Somethin' so out of the ordinary
You got me kissin' thе ground of your sanctuary
Shatter me with your touch, oh, Lord, return mе to dust
The angels up in the clouds are jealous knowin' we found

[Verse 2]
Hopeless hallelujah
On this side of Heaven's gate
Oh, my life, how do ya
Breathe and take my breath away?
At your altar, I will pray
You're the sculptor, I'm the clay

[Pre-Chorus]
Oh, my, my

[Chorus]
You're takin' me out of the ordinary
I want you layin' me down 'til we're dead and buried
On the edge of your knife, stayin' drunk on your vine
The angels up in the clouds are jealous knowin' we found
Somethin' so out (Out) of the ordinary (Ordinary)
You got me kissing the ground (Ground) of your sanctuary (Sanctuary)
Shatter me with your touch, oh, Lord, return me to dust
The angels up in the clouds are jealous knowin' we found

[Bridge]
Somethin' so heavenly, higher than ecstasy
Whenever you're next to me, oh, my, my
World was in black and white until I saw your light
I thought you had to die to find

[Chorus]
Somethin' so out of the ordinary
I want you laying me down 'til we're dead and buried
On the edge of your knife, stayin' drunk on your vine
The angels up in the clouds are jealous knowin' we found
Somethin' so out (Out) of the ordinary
You got me kissing the ground (Ground) of your sanctuary (Sanctuary)
Shatter me with your touch, oh, Lord, return me to dust
The angels up in the clouds are jealous knowin' we found

snippet.title: Season 2: Summit Official Trailer | Overwatch
snippet.description:
The fight for a better future pushes even higher during Season 2: Summit.

Our newest Damage Hero is here with the arrival of Sierra. As Head of Security for Watchpoint: Grand Mesa, Sierra takes pride in protecting those around her, and she does so with an arsenal built for controlling spaces, high and low.

Post-Match Accolades are back, giving you the ability to vote for a match’s MVP. And that’s not the only thing returning! Antarctic Peninsula is also back with new pathways and sightlines to help you in battle.

New Battle Pass and Shop skins are also arriving like the new Spring Fairy skins, Panda Jetpack Cat skin, Sakura Bundle, and the new Season 2 Mythics for both Genji and Soldier: 76.

And that’s just the beginning! Enjoy our newest arrival to Stadium with Ramattra, and Jetpack Cat, the start of Overwatch’s 10 Year Anniversary, our latest collaboration and more coming midseason.

It all starts TOMORROW in Overwatch Season 2: Summit.

Overwatch is free to play on PC and console, including Nintendo Switch™ 2
_

snippet.title: INSIDIOUS: OUT OF THE FURTHER - Official Trailer (4K)
snippet.description:
The Further comes for our world. 
Watch the official trailer for #Insidious: Out Of The Further - exclusively in theatres this August.


Follow us on social: 
https://www.instagram.com/InsidiousMovie   
https://twitter.com/InsidiousMovie  
https://www.facebook.com/InsidiousMovie  

Visit our site: https://insidious.movie 
Subscribe for more exclusive content: https://www.youtube.com/sonypictures 

Having earned over $740 million at the global box office, the Insidious franchise returns with a new family and a terror that redefines what The Further is capable of.
 
In Insidious: Out of the Further, Amelia Eve stars as Gemma, a young mother raising her daughter in the house she grew up in who discovers she can travel into The Further, the purgatorial realm of lost souls at the heart of the Insidious universe. When something evil comes after her, Gemma discovers an ability that changes everything: she doesn’t just enter The Further, she can bring what lives there back to the real world. Once the demons realize her power, our world becomes their playground.
 
With Lin Shaye reprising her iconic role as Elise Rainier and Jacob Chase (Come Play) directing, Insidious: Out of the Further opens August 21, 2026. Screenplay by Jacob Chase. Story by David Leslie Johnson-McGoldrick and Jacob Chase.

snippet.title: PIRATER est redevenu INDISPENSABLE
snippet.description:
Le piratage de jeux vidéo signe son grand retour, et ce n'est pas la faute des joueurs. Pendant des années, des plateformes comme Steam avaient presque fait disparaître le besoin de pirater en offrant un service et un confort imbattables. Mais aujourd'hui, l'industrie a totalement brisé ce contrat social.

Dans cette vidéo, on analyse pourquoi pirater est devenu pour beaucoup une nécessité, voire un acte moral. Entre la fin des prix régionaux abordables (qui explosent en Argentine, en Turquie ou en Pologne) , l'omniprésence de DRM intrusifs comme Denuvo qui ruinent les performances des PC , et des éditeurs comme Ubisoft qui suppriment l'accès à des jeux achetés légalement comme The Crew , le marché pousse les consommateurs à bout.

Comme le disait Gabe Newell il y a plus de 15 ans, le piratage n'est pas une question de prix, c'est un problème de service. Découvrez comment les pirates sont devenus, paradoxalement, les derniers défenseurs de la préservation du jeu vidéo face au tout-numérique et aux jeux service (GaaS).

#jeuvideo  #piratage #gaming

Entre la fin des prix régionaux abordables (qui explosent en Argentine, en Turquie ou en Pologne) , l'omniprésence de DRM intrusifs comme Denuvo qui ruinent les performances des PC , et des éditeurs comme Ubisoft qui suppriment l'accès à des jeux achetés légalement comme The Crew , le marché pousse les consommateurs à bout.

Comme le disait Gabe Newell il y a plus de 15 ans, le piratage n'est pas une question de prix, c'est un problème de service. Découvrez comment les pirates sont devenus, paradoxalement, les derniers défenseurs de la préservation du jeu vidéo face au tout-numérique et aux jeux service (GaaS).

#jeuvideo  #piratage #gaming

snippet.description:
Un jour, Clémence prend conscience que personne ne l'a jamais admirée. Bercée par les illusions d'une enfance chaotique, elle croise un certain Paul, petit patron autoritaire que rien ni personne n'impressionne. snippet.title: George Michael - Careless Whisper (Sub. Español + Lyrics)
snippet.description:
👤 Artista | George Michael
💿 Canción | Careless Whisper
📅 Fecha de Lanzamiento | 10/11/2006
🔊 Géneros Musicales | Pop, Soul

✨ Acerca de la Canción:
“Careless Whisper” de George Michael es una confesión cargada de culpa donde el protagonista entiende demasiado tarde el valor de la relación que arruinó. Entre miradas incómodas en la pista de baile y recuerdos que pesan más que la música, la canción retrata el momento exacto en que la conciencia no deja seguir fingiendo. El “baile” se convierte en metáfora de la conexión que ya no puede recuperarse, porque la traición rompió el ritmo para siempre.

📲 Sígue a "George Michael" en:
🔗 Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/georgemofficial

⭐ Encuéntrame en Redes:
🔗 Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/jostland_/
🌐 Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/josstland/
🎵 TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@iamjostland
📬 Contacto Directo por Instagram: @jostland_

🎶 [ Letra / Lyrics ] 🎶

[Intro]
Oh, woah, woah, oh

[Verse 1]
I feel so unsure
As I take your hand and lead you to the dance floor
As the music dies, something in your eyes
Calls to mind a silver screen and all its sad goodbyes

[Chorus]
I'm never gonna dance again
Guilty feet have got no rhythm
Though it's easy to pretend
I know you're not a fool
I should have known better than to cheat a friend
And waste the chance that I'd been given
So I'm never gonna dance again
The way I danced with you, oh

[Verse 2]
Time can never mend
The careless whispers of a good friend
To the heart and mind, ignorance is kind
There's no comfort in the truth, pain is all you'll find

[Chorus]
I'm never gonna dance again
Guilty feet have got no rhythm
Though it's easy to pretend
I know you're not a fool
I should have known better than to cheat a friend (Shoulda known better, yeah)
And waste the chance that I'd been given
So I'm never gonna dance again
The way I danced with you, oh

[Post-Chorus]
Never without your love

[Instrumental Break]

[Verse 3]
Tonight, the music seems so loud
I wish that we could lose this crowd
Maybe it's better this way
We'd hurt each other with the things we want to say
We could have been so good together
We could have lived this dance forever
But now, who's gonna dance with me?
Please stay

[Chorus]
And I'm never gonna dance again
Guilty feet have got no rhythm
Though it's easy to pretend
I know you're not a fool
I should have known better than to cheat a friend
And waste the chance that I'd been given
So I'm never gonna dance again
The way I danced with you, oh

[Instrumental Break]

[Outro]
(Now that you're gone) Now that you're gone
(Now that you're gone) Was what I did so wrong, so wrong
That you had to leave me alone?

#GeorgeMichael #CarelessWhisper #Pop
